subject: OFFERS DUE JULY 17 || The Point on Lane | 118 Beds at Ohio State University | Two-Year Master Lease w/ Ohio State University and (2) Four-Year Renewal Options   | 2018 Construction
text:
This email was sent as HTML-only. To view it, please visit:
https://my.rcm1.com/handler/email.aspx?pv=IFUCz4bFW38Aj2oPtI1O5AU1v_Op9qwAhsEEAUn0PCAcrTw71sFBf8RSdBITmg1MgbrKBN1WaZtC5hAmH8p40C7uU8Mbvhk9pbxah4wnikeonpMLqy1IP7j74-5wZZvE

		<title>Preview Email</title>
	</head>
	<body>
		<span style="margin: 0; padding: 0; font-size: 1px; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; line-height: 1px;color: #ffffff;">
                        
                    </span>
		<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="border-collapse:collapse; height:100%; width:100%;">
			<tr>
				<td class="wrapper" align="center" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:10px; text-align:left;">
					<table class="force-row" align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="border-collapse:collapse; margin:0 auto;">
						<tr>
							<td class="email_border" align="top" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-top:1px solid #435254;border-right:1px solid #435254;border-bottom:1px solid #435254;border-left:1px solid #435254;">
								<table class="email_wrapper force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="height:auto; width:800px;">
									<tr>
										<td class="email_body" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;">
											<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" width="100%">
												<tr xmlns="">

															<tr>

																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>

																				<div style="text-align:center;">
                                            Having trouble viewing this email? <a href="https://www.cbredealflow.com/handler/email.aspx?pv=IFUCz4bFW38Aj2oPtI1O5AU1v_Op9qwAhsEEAUn0PCAcrTw71sFBf8RSdBITmg1MgbrKBN1WaZtC5hAmH8p40C7uU8Mbvhk9pbxah4wnikf76TJKFZwNv6v-FVe8EeeD" target="_blank" style="color:#075691">View online instead</a>.
                                        </div>
																			</td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_main_header" valign="top" style="background-color:#075691;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:28px;padding-right:28px;padding-top:20px;">
														<!--[if mso]>

                <![endif]-->

																			<td class="image" align="left" valign="top" style="padding-bottom:0px; padding-left:0px; padding-right:0px; padding-top:20px;">
																				<img src="https://my.rcm1.com/files/wiCt6TCo4scfzY2z2k2mKbY-TDoj6s2oDIU4RTouMglCTe2cmDAY3jFid7cuksEv3eg8LsrBHkPSFloFxrS7DBICFZy-ViXr4kpGdiz87Ao.png" border="0" hspace="0" vspace="0" alt="cbre-logo.png" width="100" height="24" style="max-width:100px;width:100px;" />
																			</td>

                    </td>

                    <![endif]-->

																		<tr>
																			<td class="main_heading" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;font-family:Times, serif;color:#ffffff;font-size:36px;font-style:normal;font-weight:bold;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:20px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:15px;text-align:right">The Point on Lane</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td class="main_subheading" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#ffffff;font-size:16px;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:20px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px;text-align:right">262 W Lane Avenue, Columbus, OH</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="line-height:20px; height:20px;"> </td>
																		</tr>

                    </tr>
                    </table>
                <![endif]-->
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_single_image" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px;">
														<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
															<tr>
																<td class="responsive-image image" align="center" valign="top">
																	<img src="https://my.rcm1.com/files/uayIm0EZEOsh5cT_uuzWg_vcXWeiGnN4rLcu-pmm6KRGykA6CLbEPltf4foBLnfYsQWWaRIW7IYBimpelVVMxYR0NBb7N2LtRAm3fcW9CsUxbGNWMy8RraX1nnf4X8ja-N2bAkHwr7dGXeS8KmniMA.jpg" border="0" hspace="0" vspace="0" alt="" width="800" height="533" style="max-width:1000px;width:800px;" />
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_single_column" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:5px;padding-left:30px;padding-right:30px;padding-top:5px;">
														<table class="force-row" align="left" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
															<tr>
																<td class="content" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:10px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:10px;">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="section_heading" valign="top" style="
                                                background-color:#ffffff;
                                                font-family:Times New, serif;
                                                color:#075691;
                                                font-size:19px;
                                                font-style:normal;
                                                font-weight:bold;
                                                padding-bottom:0px;
                                                padding-left:0px;
                                                padding-right:0px;
                                                padding-top:0px;
                                                text-align:left;
                                            ">The Offering</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="
                        line-height:10px;
                        height:10px;
                    "> 
                </td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td class="copy" valign="top" style="font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#435254;font-size:13px;">CBRE, Inc, as exclusive advisor, is pleased to present for sale Point on Lane, a luxury, core student housing asset located immediately adjacent from Ohio State University (OSU). Constructed in 2018, this property boasts a variety of floorplans with Class A unit interiors. The property is currently under a master lease with Ohio State University, with guaranteed income for the next 2 years. The lease is a singlenet lease; Landlord is responsible for real estate taxes & insurance, and tenant is responsible for general repairs & maintenance and operations. OSU has two (2) four-year renewal options. This allows for minimal expenses for the Landlord with guaranteed income for at least the next two years, and up to ten years. This property gives a future owner the unique opportunity to have minimal responsibility for the first two years of the hold period with guaranteed income from a high quality tenant. <br><br>Ohio State University is the #15 public university in the United States (U.S. News 2026) and #55 in the world (CWUR 2025). It is a top research university in the U.S., conducting nearly $1.7B in research annually. Its total enrollment is over 60,000, and its endowment is $8.6B as of 2025, making it one of the largest in the country.<br></td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_buttons" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:30px;padding-right:30px;padding-top:20px;
                ">
														<!--[if mso]>
                    <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
                    <tr>
                    <td valign="top" style="width:50%;">
                    <![endif]
                -->
														<table class="force-row" align="left" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="display:inline-table;float:left;width:355px;

														<table class="force-row" align="left" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="display:inline-table;float:left;width:355px;">
															<tr>
																<td class="content" valign="top" style="
                                background-color:transparent;
                            ">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="responsive-image image" align="center" valign="top" style="
                                            padding-bottom:0px;
                                            padding-left:0px;
                                            padding-right:0px;
                                            padding-top:0px;">
																				<img src="https://my.rcm1.com/files/uayIm0EZEOsh5cT_uuzWg_vcXWeiGnN4rLcu-pmm6KSx9xnxAHRHtY_whcCHORRXmcoshNGu1G1E-kf22eKwhvGyI1GJz_TBJ32TRGPAKSHE8rL9B0JxMEeT7vDEvE7hVqi4mcpjxf1qn7aAQtop4Q.jpg" border="0" hspace="0" vspace="0" alt="" width="355" height="267" style="max-width:1000px;width:355px;" />

														<table class="force-row" align="right" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="display:inline-table;float:right;width:355px;">
															<tr>
																<td class="content text" valign="top" style="
                                background-color:transparent;
                                padding-bottom:0px;
                                padding-left:0px;
                                padding-right:0px;
                                padding-top:0px;">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="section_heading" valign="top" style="
                                                background-color:#ffffff;
                                                text-align:left;
                                                color:#075691;
                                                font-family:Times New, serif;
                                                font-style:normal;
                                                font-weight:bold;
                                                font-size:19px;
                                                padding-bottom:0px;
                                                padding-left:0px;
                                                padding-right:0px;
                                                padding-top:0px;
                                                word-break:break-word;
                                            ">Investment Highlights</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="
                                                    line-height:10px;
                                                    height:10px;
                                                "> 
                                            </td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td class="copy" valign="top" style="
                                            color:#435254;
                                            font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;
                                            font-size:13px;
                                        "><div><ul><li><span style="font-size:12pt"><strong>Strong, Guaranteed Income with Minimal Landlord Responsibility:</strong> The property benefits from a master lease with Ohio State University, guaranteeing income for at least the next two years and potentially up to ten years with renewal options. </span></li><li><span style="font-size:12pt"><strong>Prime Location Adjacent to a Top-Tier University:</strong> Situated immediately next to Ohio State University (OSU), a highly-ranked public institution (No. 15 in the U.S. News 2026 rankings and No. 55 globally by CWUR 2025), ensures consistent demand for student housing.</span></li><li><span style="font-size:12pt"><strong>High-Quality, Modern Asset:</strong> Constructed in 2018, Point on Lane is a luxury student housing property offering Class A unit interiors and a variety of floorplans, appealing to the student demographic seeking premium accommodations.</span></li><li><span style="font-size:12pt"><strong>Robust and Growing Student Market:</strong> Ohio State University boasts a total enrollment of over 60,000 students and conducts nearly $1.7 billion in research annually. The university also has a substantial endowment, reported at $8.6 billion as of June 30, 2025, reflecting its financial strength and stability. This strong university environment ensures a continuous and expanding tenant pool.</span></li><li><strong>Offered Below Replacement Cost: </strong>Point on Lane is being offered for sale at a price that new consturction would far exceed. <br></li></ul></div></td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>

                </td>

                <![endif]-->
